title: Production Trainee #79942
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Skin Care and Cosmetics Manufacturing
  • Position Title: Production Trainee
  • Working Location: North – Ang Mo Kio (Require taking few bus stops)
  • Working Hours: 5.5 days / Mon-Fri: 9am-6pm, Sat 9am-1pm
  • Salary Package: Up to SGD 2100 + AWS + Variable Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Arrange and prepare of the material and packaging material for the daily production.
  • Assist for the whole process of the production – labelling of the bottles, filling, carry and moving of products.
  • Cleaning up and maintain of the working places and maintain the good condition of the machines/asset of the department.
  • In-charge of the whole documentation, recording, update, issue, maintenance & etc,
  • from pre-weight till handover the goods to the warehouse;
  • Support internal audit and external audit for ISO such as ISO documentation update, recording and maintenance / cGMP
  • Sourcing, email enquiry to the raw material supplier on the quotation and stock availability. If the raw material is obsolete will need to counter source alternative and do pre-test before purchase the raw material;
  • Assist in coaching and guidance to the new employees;
  • Assist in raising the purchase requisition of the raw material, plan the production schedule in advance with Management based on the inventory stock level;
  • Ensure all the production operators, working environment and also the manufacturing process is following the SOP;
  • Work as a team to ensure the production is running smooth. Need to learn from the preparation and understand the production operation flow. Help other employees to complete the daily output;
  • Create, update and maintain SAP system;
  • Highlight, feedback and suggest during and/or after the monthly staff meeting;
  • Other projects and assignments as instructed or delegated by management and director

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Min. ITE in Engineering, preferably Chemistry background
  • Min. 2 years of working experience in manufacturing industry
  • Must have experience in providing training and coaching team member, able to handle queries from clients
  • Have ISO 14001, ISO 9001 and ISO 45001 / GMP knowledge is a plus

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #79942 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
